utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. In the final package: (1) destination is specified as Lisbon, Portugal; (2) travel_dates are given as October 15–19, 2024; (3) transportation includes flight details, costs, and description; (4) accommodation includes name, type, cost, and details; (5) activities list three activities with individual costs; (6) additional_services include restaurant options with costs and estimated meal budget; (7) total_budget gives a complete cost breakdown with totals. All items are fully specified with the required details. Therefore, 7/7 items are covered.
